sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: All the earth shall bow down before you, O God, and shall sing to you, shall sing to your name, O Most High

sections.author: Owen Alstott
sections.snippet: Proclaim his marvelous deeds to all the nations.

sections.author: Owen Alstott
sections.snippet: God has called us through the Gospel to possess the glory or our Lord Jesus Christ

sections.title: Many and Great
sections.author: Ricky Manalo CSP
sections.snippet: Many and great are bearers of the Word: the Christ speaks; the heart seeks. Gathered as one, we listen to the Word and share the meal of new birth.

sections.author: Let Us All Rejoice
sections.snippet: You have prepared a table before me, and how precious is the chalice that quenches my thirst

sections.title: The Body of Christ
sections.author: Sarah Hart
sections.snippet: This is the Body of Christ, beautiful, broken and blessed; miracle of the greatest of loves, presence of God in our midst. This is the Cup that he shares, endlessly emptied and poured; sacrifice made so that we might be saved now and forevermore.

sections.title: Bread of Life
sections.author: Bobby Fisher
sections.snippet: Bread of life and cup of hope, we come as gift to you. Change our hearts; fill us with peace. Transform our lives anew. Open our eyes so that we might see your presence in one another. Your life, poured out in love today, unites us all in you.

sections.title: Our God is Good
sections.author: Joshua Blakesley and Cooper Ray
sections.snippet: Our God is good! Our God is good! Holy and righteous, powerful and true.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lord have mercy! Christ have mercy! Lord have mercy!

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: When we eat this breadand drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

sections.author: Mass of St Mary Magdalena
sections.snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.  Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world. Grant us, grant us peace.
